sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE TGFMAR ADD AD_FAST CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N'
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE TGFMAR ADD AD_FAST CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N'

sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE TGFMAR ADD AD_FASTREF CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'C'
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE TGFMAR ADD AD_FASTREF CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'C'

sql.oracle: UPDATE TGFMAR SET AD_FAST = NVL(AD_FAST, 'N'), AD_FASTREF = NVL(AD_FASTREF, 'C') WHERE AD_FAST IS NULL OR AD_FASTREF IS NULL
sql.mssql: UPDATE TGFMAR SET AD_FAST = ISNULL(AD_FAST, 'N'), AD_FASTREF = ISNULL(AD_FASTREF, 'C') WHERE AD_FAST IS NULL OR AD_FASTREF IS NULL

sql.oracle: UPDATE AD_FCDEPARA SET INTEGRA_AUTO = 'S' WHERE INTEGRA_AUTO IS NULL
sql.mssql: UPDATE AD_FCDEPARA SET INTEGRA_AUTO = 'S' WHERE INTEGRA_AUTO IS NULL
